level_signals: 1-3 years+ previous experience in customer success, sales, account management
Base salary $45K + uncapped commissions OTE ~$60-70K, consistent with junior/mid-level individual contributor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 1-3 years+ previous experience in customer success, sales, account management, relationship/partner management or client services (SMB)
You have significant Salesforce experience - specifically with SF case management
Strong desire to achieve top results with a personable, positive "can-do" demeanor with a consistent record of success in a sales environment.
Excellent written/verbal communication skills in English, and Spanish is a plus
Want to be in the office Mon - Fri 🥳
You're able to appropriately manage multiple tasks with varying levels of complexity and priority
Successfully upsell merchants with additional products that will help fuel growth to their business and properly manage the entire sales cycle within our Salesforce system
You love to communicate while being empathetic, concise, and patient with our customers

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Excellent written/verbal communication skills in English, and Spanish is a plus
Expand your knowledge about the payments industry, as you closely work together with other departments within the company
A love for small business and merchant success

scope.surface: Direct sales and account management for SumUp merchants; upselling products and managing merchant relationships
scope.business_model: B2SMB fintech — payment solutions and POS products sold to small businesses
core_responsibilities: Serve as an advisor and SumUp brand ambassador to merchants
Upsell merchants with additional products and manage the entire sales cycle within Salesforce
Mentor, empower and educate merchants on SumUp's suite of products
Consistently meet and exceed success metrics including revenue and retention
Connect with customers through phone, email, and chat
Research and resolve merchant inquiries and issues
Identify opportunities for merchants to consume additional products and services
Contribute to scalability by continuously optimizing processes and creating new support content
Report on themed merchant issues or opportunities with products
Identify and recommend areas to improve efficiency and assist global teams with upsell launches

green_flags: Compensation fully disclosed: base $45K + uncapped commissions, OTE ~$60-70K
Strong benefits package: medical, dental, vision, 401K match, paid parental leave, sabbatical
22 vacation days + 8 sick days + 11 paid holidays — generous PTO
Explicitly encourages candidates who don't meet all requirements to apply
Clear cross-functional exposure across Marketing, Product, CX, and more
Defined, specific office location (Greenwood Village, CO)
red_flags: Fully in-office Monday-Friday requirement eliminates any flexibility for remote/hybrid candidates
OTE range ($60-70K) is relatively modest for an account management role with full in-office requirement in Denver metro
Role blends customer success, support, and sales without a clear primary mandate — could mean high task volume

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and years of experience requirement)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and merchant focus)
compensation.total_comp_estimate_usd (stated as OTE range ~$60-70K, treated as total comp estimate)
ambiguities: JD states '1-3 years+' experience which is an unusual range; treated as minimum 1 year with 3 years as a soft upper benchmark for the level, not a hard cap.

The JD lists compensation both as '$45K base + uncapped commissions OTE ~$60-70K' and as '$21.63 hourly' — these are stated as equivalent but may reflect hourly vs. salaried framing; both are captured.
Spanish language skill appears in the same bullet as the hard English requirement but is explicitly marked 'a plus' — classified as nice-to-have.
